## Equations
### EQ_REFERENCE_BOUNDARY — Finite-reference ladder identities and equality-conditioned defects

*Source identity and correction of frozen Task 1*

$$
PR^\dagger RP=P-\mathbf 1_{N=M_s}\Pi_{n_c=M_s},\qquad PRR^\dagger P=P-\mathbf 1_{M_r=N}\Pi_{n_c=0}
$$

status: `verified` · derived from: `R pops the highest occupied reference mode`, `R^dagger pushes the lowest empty reference mode`, `M_r>=N>=M_s` · source: paper_tex: paper-source/manuscript.tex:126-135, 495-586; benchmark: prlb-f37350e-060 Task 1

Numerical form:

```
Compress physical Jordan-Wigner R^dagger R and RR^dagger onto the eight-dimensional referenced Fock basis.
```

Code: `src/fermionic_reference_audit.py::reference_identity_audit`


### EQ_MIXED_CAR — Projected mixed canonical anticommutator

*Direct source identity and frozen Task 2*

$$
P\{c_i^\dagger,c_j\}P=\delta_{ij}P
$$

status: `verified` · derived from: `physical system CAR`, `EQ_REFERENCE_BOUNDARY`, `empty/full-sector occupations` · source: paper_tex: paper-source/manuscript.tex:131-135, 586-621; benchmark: prlb-f37350e-060 Task 2

Numerical form:

```
Evaluate every i,j anticommutator before projection; maximum residual is zero in strict and minimal models.
```

Code: `src/fermionic_reference_audit.py::mixed_car_residual`


### EQ_LOGICAL_Q — Triple-annihilation contribution in the logical vacuum

*Correction of frozen Task 3*

$$
Q=i c_1c_2c_3,\qquad Q|0_L\rangle=0,\qquad \langle0_L|Q^\dagger Q|0_L\rangle=0
$$

status: `verified` · derived from: `logical vacuum contains only zero- and two-particle components`, `mixed CAR` · source: paper_tex: paper-source/manuscript.tex:152-165; benchmark: prlb-f37350e-060 Task 3

Numerical form:

```
Construct the physical eight-mode Fock matrix and evaluate the quadratic form.
```

Code: `src/fermionic_reference_audit.py::logical_code_audit`


### EQ_ANCILLA_FRINGE — Controlled syndrome kick on a stabilized code state

*Source-calibrated correction of frozen Task 4*

$$
\Xi|\psi\rangle=0,\quad V(\lambda)|\psi\rangle=|\psi\rangle,\quad U|\psi\rangle=i|\psi\rangle\Longrightarrow\langle Y\rangle=1,\;\Theta=\pi\pmod{2\pi}
$$

status: `verified` · derived from: `all logical basis states have S12=+1`, `controlled-branch overlap`, `paper calibration <Y>=-cos Theta` · source: paper_tex: paper-source/manuscript.tex:152-173, 694-712; benchmark: prlb-f37350e-060 Task 4

Numerical form:

```
The branch overlap is i for every lambda; its imaginary part is the standard Y expectation.
```

Code: `src/fermionic_reference_audit.py::ancilla_y_signal`


### EQ_TASK5_NONUNIQUENESS — Noise-sector action missing from the Task-5 unitary contract

*Well-posedness audit for frozen Task 5*

$$
U|\psi\rangle=i|\psi\rangle,\;U|\phi\rangle=\pm i|\phi\rangle\quad( |\phi\rangle=p|\psi\rangle )\Longrightarrow\mathcal A_\pm(\lambda)=\pm e^{-i\lambda}
$$

status: `reconstructed` · derived from: `p flips S12`, `V is diagonal in Xi`, `unitarity permits independent phases on orthogonal syndrome sectors` · source: paper_tex: paper-source/manuscript.tex:694-712 specifies only the error-free cycle; benchmark: prlb-f37350e-060 Task 5

Numerical form:

```
Evaluate two unitary extensions agreeing on the stated code vector and compare amplitudes.
```
